message:
fix(scheduler): prevent ABBA deadlock in Stealer::steal() lock ordering

Stealer::steal() acquired deque lock → arena lock, while
schedule_local_push() acquired arena lock → deque lock. When a stealer
thread and the queue owner thread operated on the same LocalQueue
concurrently, this inverted lock ordering could deadlock.

Restructured steal() to acquire arena → deque (matching
schedule_local_push and steal_batch). Added concurrent regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
